    "Bar size compliance cannot be verified from the photo due to lack of scale, distance, and illegible deformation patterns."

    "Perform a physical field inspection to measure bar diameters with calipers.",

  "rationale": "A far-away photo without a scale reference or visible bar markings cannot confirm compliance with specified bar sizes for the top and bottom mats. Physical verification or close-up photography of bar markings is required prior to concrete placement.",
